rawAssistant: Careful feet are crucial right now; take a moment to study this road carefully, and make sure you're not missing anything that might've washed up overnight. We can't have any hidden surprises on our hands. That east wind whipped up some trouble back in Hollowfen – I'm still checking for soot damage here, but it looks like we dodged the worst of it.
